# freeswitch_device (Data Source)

Look up a provisioned phone by its MAC (any separators; normalized server-side).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "freeswitch_device" "reception" {
  mac = "80:5e:c0:11:22:33"
}

output "reception_number" {
  value = data.freeswitch_device.reception.number
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mac` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `domain` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `model` (String)
- `number` (String)
- `updated_at` (String)
- `vendor` (String)
